nodes.name: 中澳大利亞
nodes.summary: 中澳大利亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括伯基氏鸚鵡、Yellow-throated miner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 南澳大利亚州
nodes.summary: 南澳大利亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括Dusky moorhen、鹗、黄尾黑凤头鹦鹉等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 伯基氏鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 伯基氏鸚鵡（Bourke's parrot，学名 Neopsephotus bourkii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Bourke's parrot (Neopsephotus bourkii, formerly known as Neophema bourkii), also known as the blue-vented parrot, sundown parrot, pink-bellied parrot, Bourke's parakeet, Bourke or "Bourkie", is a small parrot found in Australia and the only species in its genus, Neopsephotus

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Bourke's parrot (Neopsephotus bourkii, formerly known as Neophema bourkii), also known as the blue-vented parrot, sundown parrot, pink-bellied parrot, Bourke's parakeet, Bourke or "Bourkie", is a small parrot found in Australia and the only species in its genus, Neopsephotus

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: These parrots can be found from the South-western parts of Queensland deep into western New South Wales, throughout Central Australia to the far northern parts of South Australia and parts of Western Australia. The Bourke's parrot's main habitat consists of areas dominated by Acacia species, particularly mulga, and spinifex plains. The species can also be found in native cypress and open eucalypt woodlands
